mapper.sql: job_id, source_dir, source_id, source_sync_run_id, incremental, root_trace_id, orchestration_mode, status, worker_id, last_heartbeat_at, running_expires_at, current_step, progress_current, progress_total, progress_message, progress_updated_at, error_code, persisted_count, error_message, attempt_count, requested_at, started_at, finished_at
mapper.insert: insert into compile_jobs ( job_id, source_dir, source_id, source_sync_run_id, root_trace_id, incremental, orchestration_mode, status, worker_id, last_heartbeat_at, running_expires_at, current_step, progress_current, progress_total, progress_message, progress_updated_at, error_code, persisted_count, error_message, attempt_count, requested_at, started_at, finished_at ) values ( #{record.jobId}, #{record.sourceDir}, #{record.sourceId}, #{record.sourceSyncRunId}, #{record.rootTraceId}, #{record.incremental}, #{record.orchestrationMode}, #{record.status}, #{record.workerId}, #{record.lastHeartbeatAt}, #{record.runningExpiresAt}, #{record.currentStep}, #{record.progressCurrent}, #{record.progressTotal}, #{record.progressMessage}, #{record.progressUpdatedAt}, #{record.errorCode}, #{record.persistedCount}, #{record.errorMessage}, #{record.attemptCount}, #{record.requestedAt}, #{record.startedAt}, #{record.finishedAt} ) on conflict (job_id) do update set source_dir = excluded.source_dir, source_id = excluded.source_id, source_sync_run_id = excluded.source_sync_run_id, root_trace_id = excluded.root_trace_id, incremental = excluded.incremental, orchestration_mode = excluded.orchestration_mode, status = excluded.status, worker_id = excluded.worker_id, last_heartbeat_at = excluded.last_heartbeat_at, running_expires_at = excluded.running_expires_at, current_step = excluded.current_step, progress_current = excluded.progress_current, progress_total = excluded.progress_total, progress_message = excluded.progress_message, progress_updated_at = excluded.progress_updated_at, error_code = excluded.error_code, persisted_count = excluded.persisted_count, error_message = excluded.error_message, attempt_count = excluded.attempt_count, requested_at = excluded.requested_at, started_at = excluded.started_at, finished_at = excluded.finished_at
mapper.select: select from compile_jobs order by requested_at desc, job_id desc
select from compile_jobs order by requested_at desc, job_id desc limit #{limit}
select from compile_jobs where source_sync_run_id is null order by requested_at desc, job_id desc limit #{limit}
select from compile_jobs where status = 'QUEUED' order by requested_at asc, job_id asc limit 1
mapper.update: update compile_jobs set status = 'RUNNING', worker_id = #{workerId}, last_heartbeat_at = #{startedAt}, running_expires_at = #{runningExpiresAt}, current_step = 'initialize_job', progress_current = 0, progress_total = 0, progress_message = '编译任务已启动，等待图执行', progress_updated_at = #{startedAt}, error_code = null, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = null, error_message = null, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1 where job_id = #{jobId} and status = 'QUEUED'

update compile_jobs set current_step = #{currentStep}, progress_current = #{progressCurrent}, progress_total = #{progressTotal}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, progress_updated_at = #{heartbeatAt}, last_heartbeat_at = #{heartbeatAt}, running_expires_at = #{runningExpiresAt} where job_id = #{jobId} and status = 'RUNNING' and worker_id = #{workerId}

update compile_jobs set status = 'SUCCEEDED', last_heartbeat_at = #{finishedAt}, running_expires_at = null, current_step = 'finalize_job', progress_message = '编译完成', progress_updated_at = #{finishedAt}, error_code = null, persisted_count = #{persistedCount}, error_message = null, finished_at = #{finishedAt} where job_id = #{jobId}

update compile_jobs set status = 'FAILED', last_heartbeat_at = #{finishedAt}, running_expires_at = null, progress_updated_at = #{finishedAt}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} where job_id = #{jobId}

update compile_jobs set status = 'FAILED', last_heartbeat_at = #{finishedAt}, running_expires_at = null, progress_updated_at = #{finishedAt}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} where job_id = #{jobId} and status = 'RUNNING'

update compile_jobs set status = 'QUEUED', worker_id = null, last_heartbeat_at = null, running_expires_at = null, current_step = null, progress_current = 0, progress_total = 0, progress_message = null, progress_updated_at = null, error_code = null, persisted_count = 0, error_message = null, started_at = null, finished_at = null where job_id = #{jobId}

update compile_jobs set status = 'QUEUED', worker_id = null, running_expires_at = null, last_heartbeat_at = null, error_code = null, error_message = null where status = 'RUNNING' and worker_id = #{workerId}
mapper.select: select job_id from compile_jobs where status = 'RUNNING' and running_expires_at is not null and running_expires_at < #{now} order by running_expires_at asc, job_id asc
